message:
feat(ffs-core): implement OpenFs API with validation, geometry caching, and test harness

Add the OpenFs high-level filesystem opening API (bd-3is):
- OpenOptions struct with skip_validation flag for recovery workflows
- Ext4Geometry struct caching groups_count, group_desc_size, csum_seed,
  and is_64bit flag computed once at open time
- OpenFs struct bundling validated superblock, geometry, and device handle
- Three constructors: open(path), open_with_options(path, opts),
  from_device(dev, opts) for flexibility
- Accessors: device(), block_size(), is_ext4(), is_btrfs(), device_len()
- parse_error_to_ffs() boundary conversion mapping ParseError variants
  to FfsError (UnsupportedFeature, InvalidGeometry, Format, Corruption)

Test infrastructure:
- TestDevice: in-memory ByteDevice implementation for zero-I/O testing
- build_ext4_image() synthetic image builder with configurable block size
- Tests: default options, ext4 open, debug format, garbage rejection,
  skip_validation bypass, parse_error mapping coverage
- Minor formatting fix in read_file offset calculation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
